questions.title: Care Home - Residential Care
questions.question_text: A resident with dementia is refusing medication. What is the BEST approach?
options: A) Administer covertly in food without assessment
B) Assess capacity, document, involve family, consider best interests
C) Call GP immediately for forcible administration order
D) Record as refused and take no further action
questions.correct_answer: B) Assess capacity, document, involve family, consider best interests
questions.explanation: Must follow Mental Capacity Act 2005 principles

questions.title: Care Home Scenario - Residential Care
questions.question_text: A resident is approaching end of life. Family are in disagreement about care plan. How do you manage this?
questions.expected_response: Hold family meeting, explain resident's wishes if known, discuss advance care planning, involve GP/palliative team, document decisions, ensure dignity maintained
